scope: READ-ONLY second-eyes review of READY_FOR_VALIDATION backend groups RichDocumentCore (MT-145..160), RetrievalContextAndRanking (MT-129..144), and a spot-check of hardened CodeIndexing (MT-097/098/099/100/104/105/106/108). Zero cargo invocations, zero product-code edits. Evidence is code-reading: source, migrations, tests-as-text, MT contracts, recorded evidence.

CodeIndexing_spotcheck.note: spot-check confirms V1 HARDEN_RECOMMENDED concerns landed real fixes except MT-097 unbounded-parse.

HIGH.title: Document permission boundary fails open to 'system' and trusts a client-supplied actor-kind header
HIGH.fix: Derive actor_kind from an authenticated principal; default to least-privileged on absence; reject kind mismatch.

HIGH.title: HTML projection does not sanitize URL schemes - javascript:/data: href survives into <a href> (stored XSS on click)
HIGH.evidence: projection.rs:151-158 (href=escape_html(target)); escape_html (226-239) escapes quotes/angle but not scheme
HIGH.fix: Allowlist href/src schemes (http,https,mailto,internal refs); neutralize javascript:/data:/vbscript:.

HIGH.title: import -> load is broken for HTML and markdown-table inputs (importedRaw is not a known BlockKind)
HIGH.evidence: import.rs:117,230 emit importedRaw; block_tree.rs:110-131 has no importedRaw arm -> load/blocks/projection 400 on any imported HTML/table doc
HIGH.fix: Add ImportedRaw to BlockKind (or emit a supported placeholder); add an import->load round-trip test.

MEDIUM.title: Derived block id churns on structural edits; stability depends on the frontend persisting attrs.block_id (unverified)
Non-atomic save+index: post-commit error path returns 400/500 for an already-committed save
Projection reads embed targets from raw content_json attrs, bypassing MT-152 typed validation
Embed typed-reference validation never enforced on the document save path (only the side table)
MEDIUM.evidence: knowledge.rs:4532 save; api:466-496 backlinks-only; upsert_knowledge_document_embed (4801) separate

MEDIUM.title: Block/title/embed content indexing into the Project Knowledge Index is not implemented (links/tags only)
MEDIUM.evidence: backlink.rs persists edges/tags; no search-index write

MEDIUM.title: History endpoint unbounded; returns full content_json of every version (response-size DoS)
MEDIUM.evidence: knowledge.rs:4601 no LIMIT; api:532-559 returns all bodies

MEDIUM.title: Batch operations and most named ops (tag/folder-color/projection-rebuild/stale-repair) unimplemented; only per-doc rename/move; empty-body move clears membership
Crash-recovery proof covers only promoted (committed) state; unsaved/draft recovery (the hard half) untested
Dangling-handle degrade holds only for entity/source; WP/MT/relationship handles never confirm (unsatisfiable plan, no degrade)
Schema scope applied post-hoc over a capped unordered fact load (recall gap); not invoked by the planner before widening
Passage fallback is a correct pure decision but unwired/unexecuted and has no integration test
MEDIUM.evidence: passage_fallback.rs:87 unit-only; compiler injects pre-built candidates

MEDIUM.title: Ranking has no integration coverage; integrated graph/passage->rank->compile path unproven
QueryPlan routes are not derived from the SemanticCatalog (spec MUST) - planner emits hardcoded routes
MEDIUM.evidence: planner.rs steps 3/5 hardcoded; routing_for/route_steps_from_entry never called

MEDIUM.title: Repair-actions endpoint (and dedicated stale/missing-evidence surfaces) named by the contract not implemented
Named scenarios exist as labels; only ranking/budget fixtures realized (hybrid/passage-fallback/stale-graph/bad-citation/no-result absent)
MEDIUM.evidence: fixtures.rs RetrievalScenario enum + rank/budget tests only

MEDIUM.title: Unbounded tree-sitter parse: no input-size or node-count guard (V1 concern not closed; catch_unwind added but no cap)
MEDIUM.evidence: parser.rs:246-263 no cap; engine.rs:258 parses unconditionally

LOW.title: Derived block ids not written back into authority JSON (frontend must persist attrs.block_id)
Schema-version inconsistency between pre-save validate (DOCUMENT_SCHEMA_VERSION) and post-save re-parse (saved.schema_version)
Broken-embed queue not reconciled against document content
block_id in relationship_id => backlink ids inherit MT-148 derived-id churn
Fixtures miss importedRaw round-trip + album/slideshow/video embed render + explicit conflict case
passage_fallback/blocked collapse to hybrid_rag/none in the durable mode column (distinction only in reason/decisions)
N+1 DB round-trips per traversal (<=2*max_nodes) and uncapped edge vector
trace trust_adjust sentinel (-1.0) misreports the actual hub penalty (-0.25)
A span with a deleted source is still marked supported=true
Per-source/snippet-cap drops coarsened to excluded_budget in the bundle items table (precise reason only in trace)
Only token+snippet caps enforced; candidate/read/tool/rerank caps are advisory
build_plan does not call validate() despite the comment; invariant enforced only at persistence
prefer_context_pack_reuse is a passthrough with no effect on the produced plan
Pack decisions reuse ContextBundleRecorded event type, distinguished only by payload.kind
Collision ordinal is positional => entity_key/relationship_id churns when impls/dups added or reordered (shared 099/100)
Re-confirm multi-declarator const extraction with a regression test

claim_mismatches.reality: DB CHECK guards only the side table knowledge_document_embeds; content_json embed blocks are saved unvalidated and are what projections render
an importedRaw 'repairable' node makes the whole document unloadable via the typed API (load/blocks/projection 400)

claim_mismatches.claim: Index rich document blocks, titles, links, tags, and embeds into Project Knowledge Index
claim_mismatches.reality: only links and tags persisted, as backlink edges; blocks/titles/embeds not indexed

claim_mismatches.claim: safe batch rename, move, tag, folder color label, projection rebuild, stale repair
claim_mismatches.reality: only per-document rename and move exist

claim_mismatches.claim: server-enforced permission boundary, not a UI hint
claim_mismatches.reality: decision is server-side but its input (actor_kind) is a free header that fails open to system

claim_mismatches.claim: a dangling handle degrades to a broader mode
claim_mismatches.reality: true only for entity/source handles; WP/MT/relationship produce an unsatisfiable plan with no degrade

claim_mismatches.claim: prefer fresh ContextPack reuse where appropriate
claim_mismatches.reality: passthrough boolean with no effect on the QueryPlan

claim_mismatches.claim: QueryPlan.route[] MUST be derived from the SemanticCatalog when present
claim_mismatches.reality: catalog->RouteStep bridge exists and is unit-tested, but the planner ignores it and emits fixed routes

claim_mismatches.claim: APIs for ... stale reason, missing evidence, and repair actions
claim_mismatches.reality: explanation/reproduction/catalog implemented; repair actions absent; stale/missing only implicit in the trace

claim_mismatches.claim: fixtures for exact lookup, graph traversal, hybrid, passage fallback, stale graph, bad citation, no-result recovery
claim_mismatches.reality: the 7 names exist; only exact-lookup/graph + ranking/budget inputs are realized

proven_genuine: MT-150/156 projection-delete leaves authority byte-identical: GENUINE (knowledge_document_model_tests.rs:371-445 compares the full RichDocument struct before/after deleting a projection rendered FROM it).
MT-159 promoted crash recovery: GENUINE for committed state (model_tests:454-499 reconnects a fresh PG handle, asserts version/content/sha/history/tree).
MT-138 trace replay: GENUINE (pipeline_tests:66 round-trips decisions[query_plan][plan_id] + retrieval_mode).
MT-155 relationship_id length-prefix injective: GENUINE (backlink.rs:324-332 separator-collision test).

CodeIndexing hardening (098/099/100/104/105/106/108): VERIFIED LANDED via code-read (ordinals, _v2 relationship_id, SCIP caps+segment rejection, staleness on 6 routes fail-closed, durable repair-queue enqueue).

security_notes.sql_injection: None found. All storage writes/reads in knowledge.rs + knowledge_retrieval.rs bind values; format! only injects compile-time column-constant strings.
security_notes.path_traversal: Embed targets: Rust constructor + DB CHECK reject absolute/UNC/file:/drive-letter (but NOT enforced on content_json save path - see MT-152). SCIP import: '..'/'.' segments rejected (scip.rs:187).
security_notes.xss: HTML projection escapes text but NOT URL schemes in href/src - javascript:/data: survives (MT-150 HIGH).
security_notes.authz: Document permission boundary fails open to system on missing header + trusts client actor-kind (MT-158 HIGH).
security_notes.dos_unbounded: History endpoint returns all version bodies (MT-156); tree-sitter parse uncapped (MT-097); graph traversal N+1 but bounded by max_nodes (MT-132).

proposed_hardening_fixlist.fix: Bind actor_kind to an authenticated principal; default to least-privileged on missing x-hsk-actor-kind; reject asserted-kind != principal.
Allowlist href/src URL schemes in the HTML (and markdown) projection; neutralize javascript:/data:/vbscript:; route embed targets through EmbedTarget.
Add ImportedRaw to BlockKind (as_node_type/from_node_type) so imported HTML/table docs are loadable/repairable; add an import->load->project round-trip test.

On save, project content_json embed blocks through EmbedTarget::new + upsert into knowledge_document_embeds (or reject); makes the typed-reference + path law govern real content and removes the projection bypass.
Fold backlink rebuild into the save transaction (or treat index-step failures as non-fatal like the permission-denial path) so a committed save never returns an error.
Paginate history and omit content_json from the version list (return metadata + sha; lazy-load a single version body).
Confirm WP/MT against the packet/MT store and relationship_id against knowledge_edges; degrade + record reason when absent.
Have the planner resolve routing_for(target) and populate plan.route from route_steps_from_entry when a catalog entry exists; fall back to defaults otherwise.
Wire graph-result -> passage_fallback -> rank_candidates -> compile into one executed path; add a PG test that drives fallback + ranking end-to-end.
Add a draft/unsaved (write-box / draft-label) recovery test - the non-trivial half of the contract.
Add a byte/node cap before tree-sitter parse (skip+repair-queue oversized files), mirroring the SCIP caps.
Implement batch endpoints with per-item receipts + partial-failure reporting; distinguish absent vs explicit-null in move; or descope the unbuilt ops.
Wire document block text/title/tags/embeds into the Project Knowledge Index on save, or descope MT-154 to link/tag edges explicitly.
Push schema scope into the fact SQL (WHERE predicate_term_id IN ...) and invoke schema_first_filter in the planner before widening.
Add a retrieval repair-action endpoint (refresh stale bundle / re-extract missing evidence) and surface stale/missing evidence explicitly.
Make the collision discriminator edit-stable (signature/content hash) instead of positional ordinal, so entity_key/relationship_id do not churn on impl/duplicate add/reorder.
Inject derived block_id into attrs.block_id on save so ids survive structural edits without relying on the frontend.
Enforce candidate/read/tool/rerank caps in an executor or document them as planner hints only.
